sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64417" key="magei/raina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰγείρ-αινα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <sense id="n64417.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μάγειρος, οὐδεὶς . . μαγείραιναν εἶδε πώποτε</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
